sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4343" key="a)lki/maxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλκίμαχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bravely fighting</tr_>, or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">defender in fight</tr_>, of Athena, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.124</biblScope> </bibl> (Heges.).</sense> </entryFree>
